message: program exits while a verifier-tracked ring-buffer reference is still live
required_proof: after bpf_ringbuf_reserve succeeds, every possible exit path must release the same reference with bpf_ringbuf_submit or bpf_ringbuf_discard

related_spans.label: reference released only on the event path
cleanup skipped by the filtered return path

evidence.detail: Unreleased reference is reported at exit after the ring-buffer reserve helper
the rejected path reaches BPF_EXIT with the ring-buffer reserve ref still present in the refs set
the ret >= 0 filter is evaluated after reserve and returns before submit, discard, or map cleanup

help: Move the filter before the reserve or route the filtered path through cleanup that discards the reserved ring-buffer record before returning.
